data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — All 8 test functions present, tests fail RED (PASSED: 3 FAILED: 9, exit 1). The 3 passes are negative-path tests (refuses_missing_source, refuses_failed_source, attest_source ne checks) that pass because --attest is unknown, producing exit 1 — the correct RED condition since the attest refusal behavior also requires non-zero exit.
